<style>
        /* Custom scrollbar para tema oscuro */
        ::-webkit-scrollbar {
            width: 6px;
            height: 6px;
        }

        ::-webkit-scrollbar-track {

        ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover {

        /* Animación de "Shake" para el botón cuando hay error */
        @keyframes shake {

            0%,
            100% {
                transform: translateX(0);
            }

            25% {
                transform: translateX(-6px);
            }

            50% {
                transform: translateX(6px);
            }

            75% {
                transform: translateX(-6px);
            }
        }

        .animate-shake {
            animation: shake 0.4s cubic-bezier(.36, .07, .19, .97) both;
        }

        /* Bordes y sombras rojos brillantes para los inputs inválidos */
        .input-error {
            border-color: #ef4444 !important;
            /* Tailwind Red 500 */
            box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px #ef4444 !important;
        }

        /* Estilo y animación de aparición del texto de error */
        @keyframes slideDownFade {
            from {
                opacity: 0;
                transform: translateY(-4px);
            }

            to {
                opacity: 1;
                transform: translateY(0);
            }
        }

        .error-message {
            color: #ef4444;
            font-size: 0.75rem;
            font-weight: 500;
            margin-top: 0.375rem;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 0.25rem;
            animation: slideDownFade 0.25s ease-out forwards;
        }

        /* Toast Notifications */
        #toast-container {
            position: fixed;
            bottom: 1.5rem;
            right: 1.5rem;
            z-index: 50;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 0.75rem;
        }

        .toast {
            min-width: 250px;
            padding: 1rem;
            border-radius: 0.5rem;
            color: white;
            font-size: 0.875rem;
            font-weight: 500;
            box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1), 0 2px 4px -1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 0.75rem;
            animation: slideInRight 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1) forwards;
        }

        .toast.toast-success {
            background-color: #10b981;
            /* Tailwind emerald-500 */
            border: 1px solid #059669;
        }

        .toast.toast-error {
            background-color: #ef4444;
            /* Tailwind red-500 */
            border: 1px solid #dc2626;
        }

        .toast.hiding {
            animation: fadeOutRight 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1) forwards;
        }

        @keyframes slideInRight {
            from {
                transform: translateX(100%);
                opacity: 0;
            }

            to {
                transform: translateX(0);
                opacity: 1;
            }
        }

        @keyframes fadeOutRight {
            from {
                transform: translateX(0);
                opacity: 1;
            }

            to {
                transform: translateX(100%);
                opacity: 0;
            }
        }

        /* =============================================
            LOG VIEWER MODAL — Terminal Style
        ============================================= */
        #log-modal-backdrop {
            position: fixed;
            inset: 0;
            background: rgba(2, 6, 23, 0.85);
            backdrop-filter: blur(6px);
            z-index: 100;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            padding: 1.5rem;
            animation: fadeInBackdrop 0.2s ease forwards;
        }

        #log-modal-backdrop.hidden {
            display: none;
        }

        @keyframes fadeInBackdrop {
            from {
                opacity: 0;
            }

            to {
                opacity: 1;
            }
        }

        #log-modal {
            width: 100%;
            max-width: 860px;
            max-height: 80vh;
            background: #050d05;
            border: 1px solid #1a3a1a;
            border-radius: 10px;
            box-shadow:
                0 0 0 1px #0f2a0f,
                0 0 40px rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.08),
                0 30px 80px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7);
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            overflow: hidden;
            animation: slideUpModal 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.3, 0.64, 1) forwards;
        }

        @keyframes slideUpModal {
            from {
                opacity: 0;
                transform: translateY(24px) scale(0.97);
            }

            to {
                opacity: 1;
                transform: translateY(0) scale(1);
            }
        }

        /* Barra de título del terminal */
        #log-modal-titlebar {
            background: #0a1a0a;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #1a3a1a;
            padding: 0.65rem 1rem;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: space-between;
            gap: 0.75rem;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }

        .terminal-dots {
            display: flex;
            gap: 6px;
        }

        .terminal-dots span {
            width: 12px;
            height: 12px;
            border-radius: 50%;
        }

        .dot-close {
            background: #ff5f57;
        }

        .dot-min {
            background: #ffbd2e;
        }

        .dot-max {
            background: #28c840;
        }

        #log-modal-title {
            font-family: 'Courier New', monospace;
            font-size: 0.75rem;
            color: #4ade80;
            letter-spacing: 0.05em;
            flex: 1;
            text-align: center;
            opacity: 0.8;
        }

        #log-modal-close-btn {
            background: transparent;
            border: 1px solid #1e4a1e;
            border-radius: 5px;
            color: #4ade80;
            font-size: 0.7rem;
            font-family: 'Courier New', monospace;
            padding: 0.2rem 0.6rem;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: background 0.15s, border-color 0.15s;
            white-space: nowrap;
        }

        #log-modal-close-btn:hover {
            background: #1a3a1a;
            border-color: #4ade80;
        }

        /* Zona de logs */
        #log-modal-body {
            flex: 1;
            overflow-y: auto;
            padding: 1rem 1.25rem;
            font-family: 'Courier New', Courier, monospace;
            font-size: 0.78rem;
            line-height: 1.7;
            color: #86efac;
            /* green-300 */
            background: #050d05;
            position: relative;
        }

        /* Efecto scanlines sutil */
        #log-modal-body::after {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            inset: 0;
            background: repeating-linear-gradient(to bottom,
                    transparent,
                    transparent 2px,
                    rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.07) 2px,
                    rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.07) 4px);
            pointer-events: none;
        }

        #log-output .log-line-info {
            color: #86efac;
        }

        /* verde */
        #log-output .log-line-success {
            color: #4ade80;
            font-weight: bold;
        }

        #log-output .log-line-error {
            color: #f87171;
            font-weight: bold;
        }

        /* rojo */
        #log-output .log-line-warn {
            color: #facc15;
        }

        /* amarillo */
        #log-output .log-line-default {
            color: #d1fae5;
            opacity: 0.75;
        }

        /* Estado de carga dentro del modal */
        #log-modal-loader {

            font-family: 'Courier New', monospace;
            font-size: 0.8rem;

        }

        @keyframes blink {

            0%,
            100% {
                opacity: 1;
            }

            50% {
                opacity: 0;
            }
        }

        .terminal-cursor {
            display: inline-block;
            width: 8px;
            height: 14px;
            background: #4ade80;
            vertical-align: middle;
            animation: blink 0.9s step-end infinite;
        }

        /* =============================================

        #settings-backdrop {

            background: rgba(2, 6, 23, 0.80);

            z-index: 110;

            justify-content: center;

        }

        #settings-backdrop.hidden {
            display: none;

        #settings-modal {
            width: 100%;
            max-width: 640px;
            max-height: 85vh;
            background: #0f172a;
            border: 1px solid #1e293b;
            border-radius: 14px;
            box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px #1e293b, 0 32px 80px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7);
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            overflow: hidden;
            animation: slideUpModal 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.3, 0.64, 1) forwards;
        }

        /* Header */
        #settings-header {
            padding: 1.25rem 1.5rem 0;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #1e293b;
            background: #0f172a;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }

        #settings-header .s-title-row {

            align-items: center;
            justify-content: space-between;
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
        }

        #settings-header h2 {
            font-size: 1.1rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #f8fafc;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 0.6rem;
        }

        #settings-header h2 i {
            color: #818cf8;
            font-size: 1rem;
        }

        #settings-close-btn {
            background: transparent;
            border: none;
            color: #64748b;
            font-size: 1.1rem;
            cursor: pointer;
            padding: 0.25rem;
            border-radius: 6px;
            transition: color 0.15s, background 0.15s;
        }

        #settings-close-btn:hover {
            color: #f8fafc;
            background: #1e293b;
        }

        /* Tab bar */
        .s-tabs {
            display: flex;
            gap: 0;
        }

        .s-tab-btn {
            padding: 0.65rem 1.2rem;
            font-size: 0.83rem;
            font-weight: 500;
            color: #64748b;
            border: none;
            background: transparent;
            cursor: pointer;
            border-bottom: 2px solid transparent;
            transition: color 0.15s, border-color 0.15s;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 0.4rem;
            white-space: nowrap;
        }

        .s-tab-btn:hover {
            color: #cbd5e1;
        }

        .s-tab-btn.active {
            color: #818cf8;
            border-bottom-color: #818cf8;
        }

        /* Body */
        #settings-body {
            flex: 1;
            overflow-y: auto;
            padding: 1.5rem;
            background: #0f172a;
        }

        .s-tab-panel {
            display: none;
        }

        .s-tab-panel.active {
            display: block;
        }

        /* Field groups */
        .s-field-group {
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
        }

        .s-section-title {
            font-size: 0.7rem;
            font-weight: 600;
            color: #475569;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.08em;
            margin-bottom: 0.9rem;
            padding-bottom: 0.5rem;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #1e293b;
        }

        .s-field {
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
        }

        .s-label {
            display: block;
            font-size: 0.8rem;
            font-weight: 500;
            color: #94a3b8;
            margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
        }

        .s-hint {
            font-size: 0.72rem;
            color: #475569;
            margin-top: 0.3rem;
        }

        .s-input {
            width: 100%;
            background: #020617;
            border: 1px solid #1e293b;
            color: #e2e8f0;
            font-size: 0.83rem;
            border-radius: 8px;
            padding: 0.6rem 0.85rem;
            outline: none;
            transition: border-color 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s;
        }

        .s-input:focus {
            border-color: #818cf8;
            box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(129, 140, 248, 0.15);
        }

        .s-input::placeholder {
            color: #334155;
        }

        /* Toggle switch */
        .s-toggle-row {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: space-between;
            gap: 1rem;
            padding: 0.75rem 0;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #1e293b;
        }

        .s-toggle-row:last-child {
            border-bottom: none;
        }

        .s-toggle-info .s-toggle-label {
            font-size: 0.83rem;
            font-weight: 500;
            color: #cbd5e1;
        }

        .s-toggle-info .s-toggle-desc {
            font-size: 0.72rem;
            color: #475569;
            margin-top: 0.1rem;
        }

        .s-switch {
            position: relative;
            width: 38px;
            height: 22px;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }

        .s-switch input {
            opacity: 0;
            width: 0;
            height: 0;
        }

        .s-slider {
            position: absolute;
            inset: 0;
            background: #1e293b;
            border-radius: 99px;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: background 0.2s;
        }

        .s-slider:before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            width: 16px;
            height: 16px;
            left: 3px;
            bottom: 3px;
            background: #475569;
            border-radius: 50%;
            transition: transform 0.2s, background 0.2s;
        }

        .s-switch input:checked+.s-slider {
            background: #4f46e5;
        }

        .s-switch input:checked+.s-slider:before {
            transform: translateX(16px);
            background: #fff;
        }

        /* Footer del modal */
        #settings-footer {
            padding: 1rem 1.5rem;
            border-top: 1px solid #1e293b;
            background: #0f172a;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: flex-end;
            gap: 0.75rem;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }

        .s-btn-cancel {
            padding: 0.55rem 1.1rem;
            border-radius: 8px;
            border: 1px solid #1e293b;
            background: transparent;
            color: #94a3b8;
            font-size: 0.83rem;
            font-weight: 500;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: background 0.15s, color 0.15s;
        }

        .s-btn-cancel:hover {
            background: #1e293b;
            color: #e2e8f0;
        }

        .s-btn-save {
            padding: 0.55rem 1.1rem;
            border-radius: 8px;
            border: none;
            background: #4f46e5;
            color: #fff;
            font-size: 0.83rem;
            font-weight: 600;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: background 0.15s, opacity 0.15s;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 0.4rem;
        }

        .s-btn-save:hover {
            background: #4338ca;
        }

        .s-btn-save:disabled {
            opacity: 0.6;
            cursor: not-allowed;
        }

        /* ── LIGHT MODE OVERRIDES FOR SETTINGS MODAL ── */
        html:not(.dark) #settings-modal {
            background: #ffffff !important;
            border-color: #e2e8f0 !important;
            box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px #e2e8f0, 0 32px 80px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) !important;
        }
        html:not(.dark) #settings-header {
            background: #ffffff !important;
            border-bottom-color: #e2e8f0 !important;
        }
        html:not(.dark) #settings-header h2 { color: #0f172a !important; }
        html:not(.dark) #settings-close-btn:hover {
            color: #0f172a !important;
            background: #f1f5f9 !important;
        }
        html:not(.dark) #settings-body { background: #ffffff !important; }
        html:not(.dark) .s-section-title { border-bottom-color: #e2e8f0 !important; color: #64748b !important; }
        html:not(.dark) .s-label { color: #475569 !important; }
        html:not(.dark) .s-input {
            background: #f8fafc !important;
            border-color: #cbd5e1 !important;
            color: #0f172a !important;
        }
        html:not(.dark) .s-input:focus {
            border-color: #6366f1 !important;
            box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.15) !important;
        }
        html:not(.dark) .s-input::placeholder { color: #94a3b8 !important; }
        html:not(.dark) .s-toggle-row { border-bottom-color: #e2e8f0 !important; }
        html:not(.dark) .s-toggle-info .s-toggle-label { color: #0f172a !important; }
        html:not(.dark) .s-slider { background: #cbd5e1 !important; }
        html:not(.dark) .s-slider:before { background: #ffffff !important; }
        html:not(.dark) #settings-footer {
            background: #ffffff !important;
            border-top-color: #e2e8f0 !important;
        }
        html:not(.dark) .s-btn-cancel {
            border-color: #cbd5e1 !important;
            color: #475569 !important;
        }
        html:not(.dark) .s-btn-cancel:hover {
            background: #f1f5f9 !important;
            color: #0f172a !important;

    </style>

<script>
        // Lógica de UI para abrir/cerrar el panel derecho en pantallas pequeñas
        const rightPanel = document.getElementById('rightPanel');
        const toggleBtn = document.getElementById('toggleRightPanelBtn');
        const closeBtn = document.getElementById('closeRightPanelBtn');
        const overlay = document.getElementById('rightPanelOverlay');

        function togglePanel() {
            rightPanel.classList.toggle('hidden');
            overlay.classList.toggle('hidden');
        }

        if (toggleBtn) toggleBtn.addEventListener('click', togglePanel);
        if (closeBtn) closeBtn.addEventListener('click', togglePanel);
        if (overlay) overlay.addEventListener('click', togglePanel);
    </script>
